justification: All pass criteria met: (1) Manual restart requirement identified as operational gap with clear explanation of blast radius, (2) DNS-based connection resolution recommended as fix, (3) No retry on connection error identified as critical reliability gap, (4) Read replica routing identified as an optimization rather than a blocker (listed under component interactions but not escalated as a must-have), (5) Verdict is NOT READY, (6) Multiple specific recommendations provided including DNS-based failover, retry with backoff, pool exhaustion metrics, statement_timeout, and circuit breakers.

observations.text: Correctly escalated both the manual restart and no-retry gaps to MJ with clear reasoning about blast radius and production impact
Excellent granularity in failure mode analysis — covered six distinct scenarios beyond the expected three, including pool exhaustion, slow queries, degraded primary, and health check gaps
Properly categorized read replica routing as a risk/optimization rather than a hard blocker, avoiding the failure mode of over-escalating it
Strong observability review identifying actionable gaps like connection pool metrics and distributed tracing
Confidence section is well-calibrated at 60% with honest acknowledgment of unknowns like caller retry behavior and existing infrastructure
